name: 7 Loewe
description: A mysterious, incense-heavy woody fragrance lifted by a crisp, tart apple note.

name: Accord Oud
description: A leathery, mineral oud with saffron and rose — darker and more austere than Oud Immortel, with less sweetness.

name: Aganice
description: A cool, luminous aldehyde rose named for an ancient astrologer — bright and airy, grounded in clean cedar.

name: Agua de Loewe
description: A refreshing, transparent, and unisex citrus-tea fragrance, perfect for hot weather.

name: Aguamadera
description: A transparent citrus-wood scent with smooth guaiac and cedar warmth.

name: Aldehyde 44
description: A classic aldehyde floral in the Chanel No. 5 tradition — crisp, soapy, and glamorous, but with Le Labo's raw naturalistic edge.

name: Alerce
description: Named after the ancient Patagonian larch — dense, resinous wood with cool juniper and earthy vetiver. Timeless and unhurried.

name: Allure Homme Sport
description: An energetic and luminous citrus marine scent over a creamy, musky base.

name: Ambre 29
description: A forested amber — resinous and warm with a green fir-balsam quality that keeps it from being stuffy.

name: Ambre Nuit
description: A dark, sensual encounter between the animalistic warmth of amber and the delicate elegance of Turkish rose.

name: Ambrette 9
description: A skin-close musky-woody built on ambrette seed — soft, slightly nutty, and intimate, a gentler take on Another 13's skin-scent aesthetic.

name: Another 13
description: A clean, musky skin scent with subtle fruit and soft amber, minimal and addictive.

name: Aura Floral
description: A radiant, luminous floral bouquet with a subtle, contrasting leather base.

name: Azahar
description: A classic white floral centred on orange blossom and neroli — sun-drenched, open, and Mediterranean.

name: Baie Rose 26
description: A fizzy pink pepper and rose over light woods — easy, modern, and slightly fruity in the way pink pepper reads as quasi-berry.

name: Bal d'Afrique
description: A sunlit, slightly sweet floral with sparkling citrus and soft vetiver, great for warm days and joyful casual wear.
story: “Bal d’Afrique is one of my earliest fragrances. At the time of its formulation, I was obsessed with the translation of memories into scent. At the same time, I felt confident enough to include an imaginary component. My father lived and travelled in Africa for about 10–15 years. I would read his diaries; the way he travelled on freight ships, met all kinds of different people... For me, this was the fantasy of arriving in Africa through somebody else’s words. Bal d’Afrique reflects that; it’s an imaginary journey as well as a complete celebration of how I see African culture and its influence.” – Ben Gorham

name: Ballena de la Pampa
description: A salty, musky ambergris scent inspired by whales drifting along the Patagonian coast.

name: Bergamote 22
description: Bright bergamot and grapefruit balanced with soft woods and musk, sparkling yet refined.

name: Bibliothèque
description: Old books, leather, and dry woods with a ripened-fruit warmth — evokes a well-worn library on a winter afternoon.

name: Big Sur After Rain
description: The California coastline after rainfall — eucalyptus and sage over wet stone and cedar. Meditative and singular.

name: Blanche
description: A clean, laundry-fresh floral with soft rose and creamy sandalwood, ideal for office days and low-key settings.

name: Bleu de Chanel
description: A crisp, clean, and universally appealing woody aromatic with bright citrus and a smoky incense drydown.

name: Bois d'Argent
description: An ethereal, mysterious iris and myrrh scent that weaves a soft, smoky, and powdery spell.

name: Bowmakers
description: Resinous woods evoking violin workshops and polished instruments.

name: Buenos Aires
description: A sun-warmed Argentine citrus that blooms into soft florals before fading into clean skin musk — elegant and urbane.

name: Burning Barbershop
description: A smoky barbershop scent blending mint, lavender, and caramelized vanilla.
A dark, smoky leathered iris with tobacco and pepper — named for Orwell, confrontational and politically charged.

name: Infrared
description: A sharp, acidic tomato-leaf opening that dries into a smooth vetiver-woody base — polarizing, modern, and deliberately odd.

name: Unnamed
description: A deliberate study in ambiguity — powdery iris and violet with clean woods, stripped of any identifying flourish.

name: Casablanca Lily
description: A cool, luminous white lily — expansive and watery, neither sweet nor heavy, centred on the lily's clean petals.

name: Cèdre 11
description: A spare, austere cedar with cold metallic aldehydes — minimalist and architectural, Scandinavian in its restraint.

name: Chance Eau Tendre
description: A delicate, fruity-floral interpretation of Chance. Soft, romantic, and endlessly wearable.

name: No. 5
description: The quintessential floral-aldehyde perfume. Timeless, powdery, and abstractly feminine.

name: Chergui
description: A hot Moroccan desert wind captured in a bottle. Sweet honey, dry hay, and rich tobacco swirl over warm amber and incense.
story: "A fire fanned by the wind, a desert in flames. Like the sap rising, Chergui sucks up the moisture and creates a fragrant whirlwind." – Serge Lutens

name: Coco Mademoiselle
description: A modern, vibrant oriental floral with a striking contrast of fresh citrus and sensual patchouli.

name: Comme des Garçons 2
description: A play of light and shadow inspired by Japanese calligraphy ink. Metallic aldehydes contrast with warm, earthy incense and patchouli.
story: "A fragrance inspired by the Japanese art of calligraphy. The light and shadow, the reflection and opacity."

name: Copála
description: Sacred copal resin smoke with glowing amber warmth, reminiscent of ceremonial incense.

name: Coromandel
description: A rich, baroque oriental built around an exquisite, smooth patchouli and white chocolate.

name: Costera
description: A coastal breeze of salt and citrus over driftwood and ambergris — open, breezy, and oceanic.

name: Cruz del Sur
description: Named for the Southern Cross — a cool stellar woody with iris and dry vetiver, elegant and precisely balanced.

name: Cuyen
description: Cuyen means 'moon' in Mapuche — a luminous, skin-close floral that glows softly in low light.

name: Cythera
description: Lush and sensual — a full white-floral bouquet warmed by sandalwood and benzoin, island-goddess energy.

name: Darwin
description: Bright grapefruit and airy jasmine drift into a crisp vetiver base, reminiscent of botanical exploration.

name: Debaser
description: Milky fig and green leaves with creamy coconut warmth.

name: Dior Homme Intense
description: A sophisticated, woody, and intensely powdery iris fragrance. Elegant, masculine, and refined.

name: Diptyque 34
description: A woody-floral homage to Diptyque's Saint-Germain address — books, dried flowers, leather, and warm wood in a Parisian apartment.

name: Do Son
description: Airy tuberose with orange blossom and soft musk inspired by seaside gardens.

name: Sundazed
description: A bright, hazy citrus with a coconut-water softness — feels like lying in the sun with your eyes closed.

name: Eau Capitale
description: A city rose — bold currant and rich patchouli give classic rose a modern, urban edge without sweetness.

name: Eau Capitale
description: A fresh, fruity Parisian rose with a patchouli-musk base — modern, chic, and feminine without being sweet.

name: Eau de Campagne
description: A raw, vegetal green — tomato leaf and basil on sun-warmed skin — nostalgic and hyper-naturalistic.

name: Eau de Lierre
description: Crushed ivy leaf and cool violet — fresh, slightly sappy, and garden-damp. Unobtrusive and easy to wear.

name: Eau de Minthé
description: A crisp aromatic mint-and-basil refresher — bracing and herbal rather than sweet, built for sharp clarity.

name: Eau des Sens
description: Sparkling orange and juniper with an earthy patchouli undercurrent that adds depth without heaviness.

name: Eau Duelle
description: Spicy vanilla wrapped in incense and amber warmth.

name: Eau Mohéli
description: A transparent, airy ylang-ylang from the island of Moheli — stripped of tropical weight, rendered clean and dreamlike.

name: Eau Rose
description: A clean, dewy rose brightened with citrus and soft lychee — transparent, modern, and universally easy to wear.

name: Eau Sauvage
description: The epitome of French elegance. A timeless, crisp, and refined citrus chypre.

name: Eidesis
description: A calm, grounding blend of geranium, cypress, and vetiver — quietly confident and easy across all occasions.

name: Eleventh Hour
description: Warm, boozy amber with dried-fruit sweetness and soft woods, ideal for cold evenings and close-to-skin occasions.

name: Encens 13
description: A church-incense and resin scent — smoky frankincense over myrrh and labdanum, deeply meditative and sacral.

name: Encre Noire
description: A dark, brooding, and uncompromising take on vetiver. Damp earth, dark woods, and green cypress evoke a mysterious midnight forest.

name: Endeavour
description: A crisp botanical green — pink pepper and lemon spark over Japanese hinoki and cool mint, grounded by warm palisander. Named for the spirit of exploration.

name: Eolo
description: Named for the god of wind — a spare, transparent green-citrus evoking Patagonian open air with nothing superfluous.

name: Eremia
description: Soft green tea and citrus over musky woods, evoking quiet urban nature.

name: Esencia
description: A complex, fiercely aromatic fougère. Herbal, woody, and intensely masculine.

name: Fahrenheit
description: A unique, polarizing, and legendary fragrance with a signature violet leaf and leather accord that evokes burning wood and gasoline.

name: Fleur de Peau
description: A second-skin iris-musk evoking warm, clean skin — soft, powdery, and deeply intimate without heaviness.

name: Fleur d'Oranger 27
description: Billowing orange blossom with jasmine and tuberose — warm, heady, and slightly narcotic. A solar floral for evenings.

name: Florabellio
description: A crisp apple-and-flowers opening that softens into driftwood musk — aquatic, airy, and easy on a summer day.

name: Gabrielle
description: A radiant, solar white floral bouquet that feels abstract, modern, and luminous.

name: Gaiac 10
description: A dry, smoky guaiac wood with soft citrus — clean-burning and uncluttered, almost meditative in its simplicity.

name: Géranium 30
description: A rosy, slightly minty geranium with lavender and warm wood — clean and professional without being anonymous.

name: Geranium pour Monsieur
description: A sharp, aromatic geranium brightened with mint and sage — dry and classically structured, effortlessly masculine.

name: Gloam
description: A dusky floral with powdery iris and warm cocoa undertones.

name: Gris Dior
description: A modern, sophisticated chypre that perfectly translates the iconic Dior gray into a seamless blend of rose and patchouli.

name: Gypsy Water
description: A smoky, earthy unisex scent with bright citrus opening into a pine-campfire warmth, great for relaxed everyday wear.
story: “Gypsy Water is an idealizedization of the Romany lifestyle based on a fascination with the myth. The scent of fresh soil, deep forests and campfires evokes the dream of a free, colorful lifestyle close to nature.” – Ben Gorham

name: Huemul
description: Named for the endangered Andean deer — damp forest pine, juniper, and moss, smelling of cold mountain air.

name: Hwyl
description: A smoky forest scent inspired by Japanese hinoki woods and temple incense.

name: Hypnotic Poison
description: An intoxicating, magnetic, and deeply sensual oriental vanilla with a bitter almond bite.

name: I Don't Know What
description: A transparent woody enhancer built around Iso E Super — it amplifies other fragrances and skin chemistry rather than standing alone.

name: Iguazú
description: The mist and spray of the Iguazú falls — an aquatic-green floral, vast, humid, and alive with movement.

name: Ilio
description: A sun-drenched solar floral anchored by heliotrope — warm, slightly powdery, and Mediterranean in spirit.

name: Iris 39
description: A cool, chalky iris over violet leaf — earthy, rooty, and powdery in the classical French iris tradition.

name: J'adore
description: An opulent, luminous, and finely crafted bouquet of the world's most beautiful flowers.

name: Jasmin 17
description: A dewy, natural jasmine — green and watery rather than rich and indolic, evoking jasmine picked in the early morning.

name: Karst
description: Mineral, herbaceous freshness with crisp juniper and dry woods.

name: Katanka
description: A leathered rose with warm spice and oud — one of the more declarative, formal entries in the Fueguia line.

name: Kyoto
description: A meditative cedar-and-incense evoking a Japanese temple — clean, contemplative, and spare.

name: La Cautiva
description: A lush tuberose balanced by dark currant and soft sandalwood, rich but airy.

name: La Tulipe
description: A precise, dewy floral centred on tulip — clean and quietly feminine, worn without occasion.

name: Labdanum 18
description: A dense, resinous amber built on labdanum — dark, animalic, and rich. Intense projection that opens into warm sandalwood.

name: Le Lion de Chanel
description: A bold, majestic amber fragrance dominated by a leathery labdanum and sensual vanilla.

name: Lil Fleur
description: A soft, slightly powdery amber with warm cashmere and citrus — gentle, comforting, and barely there.

name: 001 Man
description: A clean, modern, and sensual woody musk fragrance with a subtle, powdery violet finish.

name: 001 Woman
description: A bright, sparkling floral with a unique, cozy linen accord and a creamy vanilla base.

name: Loewe Earth
description: A surprising and earthy chypre featuring a unique truffle note over a bed of violet and vetiver.

name: L'Ombre Dans L'Eau
description: Green currant leaves and romantic rose with earthy moss.

name: Luciérnaga
description: Named for the firefly — a luminous, warm white floral with a peachy softness that glows gently on skin.

name: Lys 41
description: A lush white floral bouquet with creamy vanilla warmth.

name: Malbec
description: Inspired by Argentine wine — dark berry and leather over dry tobacco and wood, simultaneously elegant and rustic.

name: Marrakech Intense
description: Warm spices and florals over sandalwood and patchouli, inspired by Moroccan markets.

name: Miraceti
description: A deep resinous amber inspired by maritime trade and spice routes.

name: Miss Dior
description: A sweet, velvety, and colourful floral fragrance that celebrates love and happiness.

name: Mississippi Medicine
description: Swampy medicinal herbs over tobacco and earthy moss — the American South distilled into a bottle. Unusual and unmistakable.

name: Mixed Emotions
description: Dry, inky tea and woods with a subtle fruitiness, wearing like a contemplative, quiet veil perfect for workdays.
story: “We are in the business of bottling up emotions. I hope that people read the label and identify with that sentiment in its simplest form, and then find something deeper to relate to: the juxtaposition between the familiar and the unfamiliar.” – Ben Gorham

name: Mojave Ghost
description: A desert-air blend of magnolia, musk, and sandalwood — ghostly, clean, and quietly intimate. One of the most universally wearable modern scents.
story: “The Mojave Desert is a vast prehistoric landscape spanning southeastern California, southern Nevada, southwestern Utah and northwestern Arizona. It is an immense expanse of climatic extremes. Within this parched and seemingly lifeless environment lives a flower with a phantom-like beauty: the Mohavea confertiflora, also known as the Mojave Ghost.”

name: Montecisto
description: Green fig leaves and herbs over soft moss, evoking tropical gardens.

name: Mousse de Chêne 30
description: A raw oakmoss chypre — earthy, damp, and deeply green, one of the few contemporary fragrances that fully commits to real chypre territory.

name: Musc 25
description: A clean, powdery white musk with cardamom and soft cedar — refined rather than detergent-flat, worn close to the skin.

name: Néroli 36
description: A clean, sparkling neroli-and-white-tea — crisp and coastal without sunscreen associations, genuinely elegant.

name: Número Uno
description: A clean, sparkling Mexican citrus anchored in vetiver and sandalwood — effortless to wear in any warm setting.

name: Numia
description: Earthy and mineral — violet leaf and pepper over dark labdanum and benzoin, evoking dry soil and ancient stone.

name: Night Veils: Fleur Fantome
description: A dense floral-amber with oud that blooms in darkness — heavy, ceremonial, and built for the night.

name: Night Veils: Oud Sans Soucis
description: Stripped-down oud without ornamentation — raw, leathery, and austere, for those who want nothing else.

name: Night Veils: Prismatic Dream
description: A silvery, ethereal floral-amber with powdery iris and rose — dreamlike and diffuse, like light through crystal.

name: Night Veils: Tobacco Mandarin
description: Sweet mandarin softens tobacco flower over a warm oud base — the most approachable of the Night Veils collection.

name: Olene
description: A bright, transparent white floral bouquet — springlike and airy, cheerful without being heavy.

name: Olous
description: A bright neroli and iris softened with jasmine and sandalwood — Mediterranean-clean, quietly elegant.

name: Open Sky
description: A transparent, airy green-woody scent evoking open air and altitude — minimal, contemplative, and clean.

name: Ore
description: A blend of pre-Columbian resins — elemi, copal, and frankincense — slow-burning and ceremonial.

name: OroNardo
description: Radiant tuberose wrapped in creamy sandalwood and citrus blossom, rich yet elegant.

name: Orphéon
description: A cool, smoky iris-and-juniper over dry woods — unisex and architectural, inspired by a Parisian bar.

name: Oud 27
description: Le Labo's approachable oud — rose and geranium temper its resinous darkness, smoky and rich but never medicinal.

name: Oud Immortel
description: Spiced rose and tobacco build over a dense oud and amber base — a full, ceremonial scent for cold evenings or formal occasions.

name: Ouranos
description: Airy and celestial, with powdery iris and violet lifted on clean aldehydes — named for the sky, weightless and pale.

name: Oyedo
description: A sharply bright Japanese citrus — yuzu, mandarin, and thyme — with almost no transition. Fast-drying, vivid, and outdoorsy.

name: Palo Santo
description: Sacred Palo Santo smoke grounded in frankincense and warm amber — meditative, earthy, and deeply resinous.

name: Pampeana
description: Dry pampas grass, hay, and tobacco — a chypre-leaning earthy scent evoking the Argentine grasslands at dusk.

name: Panal
description: A golden honeyed amber centred on beeswax — warm and sweet without being gourmand, deeply comforting.

name: Patagonia
description: The open air of the Patagonian steppe — bright citrus, wild herbs, and dry grassy vetiver. Clean, spare, and expansive.

name: Patchouli 24
description: Smoky birch tar and thick patchouli over resinous amber — abrasive, masculine, and polarising. Unmistakable.

name: Paula's Ibiza
description: A bohemian, sun-drenched summer fragrance capturing the essence of the Balearic Islands with coconut and driftwood.

name: Philosykos
description: Green fig leaves and creamy fig milk over dry woods, fresh and Mediterranean.

name: Platinum Égoïste
description: A sharp, metallic, and incredibly crisp fougère that exudes confidence and cleanliness.

name: Poivre 23
description: A dry, assertive pepper-and-cardamom over clean woods — angular and confident, for those who like fragrance with edges.

name: Ptolemy
description: A classical chypre with fresh berry and rose over mossy, earthy dry-down — structured and quietly distinctive.

name: Pulp
description: Tropical fruit pulp — fig, blood orange, and currant — soured by green notes and grounded in patchouli. Strange, addictive, and difficult to place.

name: Radio Bombay
description: Spiced sandalwood and cardamom drifting through jasmine smoke — a cinematic, Bollywood-radio scent that lodges itself in memory.

name: Reine de Nuit
description: A nocturnal white floral — jasmine and tuberose intensified under darkness, sensual and enveloping.

name: Across Sands
description: A dry, smoky amber evoking a desert under a vast open sky — incense and myrrh over warm sandalwood.

name: At the Barber's
description: The nostalgic smell of a classic barbershop — warm leather strop, lavender, and talc-dusted iris.

name: Autumn Vibes
description: A cozy, spiced autumnal warmth of mulled spices — cinnamon, cardamom, and vanilla over resinous amber.

name: Beach Walk
description: Sunscreen on warm skin, a gentle ocean breeze, and the feel of sand between your toes — a perfect beach day in a bottle.

name: By the Fireplace
description: Crackling wood fire, roasted chestnuts, and vanilla smoke drifting through a winter room.

name: Car Leather 1957
description: The distinct smell of pristine leather upholstery in a classic automobile — cool, clean, and deliberately evocative.

name: Coffee Break
description: A mid-morning espresso pause — rich roasted coffee with a clean skin finish that's comforting rather than sweet.

name: Flower Market
description: A fresh, dewy armful of spring flowers — light, natural, and cheerfully alive without being sweet.

name: From the Garden
description: The raw, authentic smell of a working garden — sappy tomato leaf and cut greenery over a fresh rose heart.

name: Jazz Club
description: Dim lighting, leather booths, and late-night cigarette smoke at a jazz club — rum, tobacco, and vanilla.

name: Lazy Sunday Morning
description: The scent of clean white linen on a slow, sunlit morning — powdery, soft, and deeply comforting.

name: Lipstick On
description: A vintage powdery lipstick worn on warm skin — retro, softly feminine, and deeply nostalgic.

name: Matcha Meditation
description: A serene, zen-like green tea and matcha — clean, herbal, and quietly grounding for focused mornings.

name: On a Date
description: A warm, sweetly romantic scent — the anticipation of a first date, with raspberry, rose, and caramel warmth.

name: On the Beach
description: A lighter, more watery take on the beach — translucent coconut water and sea salt over a clean ambergris base.

name: Sailing Day
description: The crisp, salty exhilaration of an open-water sail — citrus and sea spray over dry vetiver and driftwood.

name: Spring/Summer in a Bottle
description: A literal bottled season — breezy, sunny, and effortlessly cheerful, wearing like the first warm day of the year.

name: Summer on the Terrace
description: Warm evenings on a Mediterranean terrace — bright citrus and honeysuckle with a soft peach warmth at dusk.

name: Under the Lemon Trees
description: A sun-warmed afternoon under Italian lemon trees — bright citrus, neroli, and a whisper of peach.

name: When the Rain Breaks
description: The precise earthy-mineral smell of the first rain hitting dry pavement — petrichor, green tea, and clean wood.

name: Whispers in the Library
description: The dusty, contemplative smell of old paper and aged books in a quiet reading room — iris, white wood, and soft amber.

name: Rose 31
description: A spicy rose with cumin and woods that transforms the floral into something smoky and unisex.

name: Rose Noir
description: A smoky, incense-draped rose with dry guaiac wood — less romantic than sinister, worn as a statement not a gesture.

name: Roses Barres
description: A deconstructed, thorny rose stripped of sweetness — peppery and green, smelling of the stem rather than the bloom.

name: Rōzu
description: A woody rose accented by shiso and spices, elegant and architectural.

name: Salares
description: Inspired by Argentina's salt flats — dry, mineral iris over warm amber, arid and otherworldly.

name: Santal 26
description: A creamy, caramelised sandalwood that reads closer to amber-vanilla in dry-down — smooth and more crowd-pleasing than Santal 33.

name: Santal 33
description: A smoky sandalwood and leather scent softened by iris and violet, iconic and instantly recognizable.

name: Sauvage
description: A radically fresh and incredibly powerful scent with spicy bergamot and a potent ambery wood trail.

name: Selknam
description: Named for the indigenous people of Tierra del Fuego — primal smoke, resin, and earth, raw and atmospheric.

name: Seven Veils
description: A thick, ceremonial amber with heavy patchouli and labdanum layered over rose and spice — dense, rich, and declarative.

name: Slow Dance
description: A soft floral haze of violet, jasmine, and tart currant — intimate and unhurried, like a slow evening at home.

name: Solo Loewe
description: A unique harmony of contrasting elements: wet stones and dry woods, citrus and spices.

name: Solo Loewe Cedro
description: A stripped-back, elegant woody fragrance emphasizing smooth, high-quality cedar.

name: Spicebomb
description: An explosive cocktail of warm spices, cinnamon, and sweet tobacco. Extroverted, fiery, and deeply comforting.

name: Sunday Cologne
description: Bright, clean citrus opening with a hint of floral and a soft musky base, perfect for warm-weather casual wear.

name: Sundazed
description: A warm, tropical-adjacent amber with neroli and coconut — lazy, sun-soaked, and utterly unhurried.

name: Super Cedar
description: A crisp, aromatic cedar sharpened by juniper and green apple — clean and functional, disappears into the skin.

name: Sycomore
description: A masterclass in vetiver. Smoky, earthy, and refined, evoking autumn woods.

name: Tabac 28
description: A grassy, hay-like tobacco sweetened with iris and dry sandalwood — more aromatic meadow than smoking lounge.

name: Tacit
description: A crisp citrus-herbal scent with basil and yuzu over clean woods.

name: Tam Dao
description: Creamy sandalwood and cypress recalling sacred forests in Vietnam.

name: Tempo
description: A modern, textured patchouli softened by violet and rose — earthy and dark without the retro connotations.

name: Terre d'Hermès
description: An elemental masterpiece of bitter orange, sharp flint, and earthy vetiver. Confident, grounded, and endlessly versatile.
story: "Feeling the earth, lying on the ground, gazing at the sky." – Jean-Claude Ellena

name: Amber Absolute
description: A voluminous incense-laden amber with saffron and myrrh — near-religious in its richness and gravity.

name: Beau de Jour
description: A crisp, elegant fougère rooted in lavender and oakmoss — the quintessential clean barbershop-meets-outdoors masculine.

name: Black Orchid
description: A dark, Gothic floral chypre — truffle, black orchid, and patchouli collide in Tom Ford's most theatrical signature.

name: Coffee Rose
description: Dark roasted coffee amplifies a rich rose over warm oud and vanilla — a deeply aromatic evening fragrance.

name: Costa Azzurra
description: A Mediterranean coastal woody — resinous mastic and oakmoss over dry cypress and sandalwood, salty and sun-warmed.

name: Fucking Fabulous
description: A provocative leather-almond pairing that straddles masculine and feminine — confident, sweet, and entirely itself.

name: Grey Vetiver
description: A clean, tailored grey vetiver with sage and grapefruit — quietly authoritative, boardroom-ready without effort.

name: Italian Cypress
description: A sharp, vertical green wood built around Mediterranean cypress — elemental, sun-bleached, and architectural.

name: Lavender Extreme
description: An intensified lavender pushed toward the aromatic extreme — fuller and denser than a typical fougère, with a warm amber finish.

name: Lost Cherry
description: A lush, boozy cherry with dark almond and warm benzoin — opulent, addictive, and unapologetically hedonistic.

name: Neroli Portofino
description: A sun-drenched Italian Riviera citrus — clean, airy, and instantly transporting, best worn in warm light.

name: Noir de Noir
description: An opulent nocturnal rose layered over black truffle and oud — dark, sensual, and ceremonialy rich.

name: Noir Extreme
description: A warm, honeyed oriental with creamy sandalwood and nutmeg — richer and more opulent than the standard Noir.

name: Ombré Leather
description: A stark, metallic leather with cool jasmine and cardamom — austere and modern, less animalic than Tuscan Leather.

name: Oud Wood
description: A refined, smoky oud balanced with rosewood and cardamom — more wearable than most ouds, quietly luxurious.

name: Rose Prick
description: A defiant modern rose — thorny and green, brightened by berry and given attitude by earthy patchouli.

name: Santal Blush
description: A soft, creamy sandalwood kissed with warm cinnamon and rose — smooth, understated, and skin-close.

name: Sole di Positano
description: A bright Amalfi coast citrus lifted with tiare and jasmine over a tropical coconut base — effortless summer radiance.

name: Soleil Blanc
description: A luminous, creamy solar scent with tiare and ylang over coconut sandalwood — sunlit, warm, and deeply seductive.

name: Tobacco Oud
description: A powerful marriage of raw tobacco and dark oud over rose and leather — dense, commanding, and built for cold evenings.

name: Tobacco Vanille
description: A richly indulgent tobacco wrapped in vanilla and cacao — opulent, warm, and unapologetically sweet.

name: Tuscan Leather
description: A bold animalic leather sharpened by raspberry and saffron — assertive, polarizing, and unmistakably confident.

name: Velvet Orchid
description: A plush, after-dark orchid with rum and honey over velvety suede — sumptuous and seductive.

name: White Suede
description: A powdery, delicate suede with a clean white floral heart — soft, clean, and quietly feminine.

name: Thé Noir 29
description: Dark tea and fig layered over tobacco and woods, moody and slightly sweet.

name: Tierra del Fuego
description: A smoky amber with sharp pink pepper and cypress, evoking windswept southern forests and distant fires.

name: Timbuktu
description: A masterful, dry, earthy blend of green mango, vetiver, and sheer incense inspired by West African perfumery traditions.
story: "Inspired by 'Wusulan', a tradition where Malian women perfume their hair and skin with roots and magical resins."

name: Tonka 25
description: Soft tonka and vanilla wrapped in amber warmth, cozy and slightly powdery.

name: Tulipe
description: A delicate floral that captures the papery quality of a tulip petal — cool, slightly spicy, and architecturally precise.

name: Vetiver 46
description: Dark, smoky vetiver with incense and woods, powerful and brooding.

name: Vetyverio
description: Sparkling grapefruit cut by black pepper opens into a cool, earthy vetiver — linear, unisex, and all-season.

name: Vetyverio
description: A clean, slightly smoky vetiver with pepper and sage — dry and structural, works in any season.

name: Volutes
description: A warm tobacco-and-vanilla oriental with elegant iris — smoky and sweet in equal measure, sophisticated and unhurried.

name: Wonderwood
description: An overdose of woods. A synthetic, minimalist explosion of cedar and sandalwood with a dry, peppery incense opening.

name: Yapay
description: A clean, spare green tea with delicate violet and dry cedar — contemplative and quiet, perfect for focused mornings.

name: Ylang 49
description: A clean ylang-ylang that avoids banana-tropical clichés — reads as white floral and elegant, supported by warm sandalwood.

name: Black Opium
description: Dark coffee and warm vanilla create an intoxicating, sensual scent perfect for evening wear and special occasions.

name: Libre
description: Lavender and amber blend into a bold, free-spirited fragrance that works for day or evening with quiet confidence.

name: Mon Paris
description: Romantic berry and peony dance together in a luxurious scent ideal for date nights and intimate moments.

name: Opium
description: Spiced and sensual with warm amber undertones, this iconic oriental fragrance projects confidence and timeless elegance.

name: Y
description: Clean woody and aromatic with a touch of spice, offering a versatile scent for modern daily wear.

name: Wood Sage & Sea Salt
description: Crisp coastal herbs and mineral sea salt evoke a breezy seaside walk; perfect for layering or everyday freshness.

name: Lime Basil & Mandarin
description: Zesty citrus and herbaceous basil create a bright, uplifting scent ideal for daytime and layering versatility.

name: Peony & Blush Suede
description: Delicate peony with soft suede and musk creates a tender, intimate fragrance perfect for romantic moments and layering.

name: English Pear & Freesia
description: Succulent pear and airy freesia blend into a light, elegant scent that feels both fruity and floral throughout the day.

name: Velvet Rose & Oud
description: Rich rose and creamy oud create a luxurious, sensual composition that bridges floral romance with woody depth.

name: Myrrh & Tonka
description: Warm myrrh and creamy tonka create a comforting, sensual fragrance with subtle spice and underlying sweetness.

name: Bloom
description: Intoxicating tuberose and jasmine create a lush, romantic floral that transitions beautifully from day to evening.

name: Guilty Pour Femme
description: Fruity top notes and creamy florals blend into an intoxicating, guilty-pleasure scent perfect for evening wear.

name: Mémoire d'une Odeur
description: Clean aromatic and woody notes create a subtle, sophisticated memory of a moment—equally worn by all.

name: Flora Gorgeous Gardenia
description: Honeyed gardenia and soft peach create a warm, romantic floral perfect for daytime elegance and intimate moments.

name: Guilty Pour Homme
description: Aromatic lavender and spicy cedar transition to warm amber and leather, creating a sophisticated masculine fragrance.

name: 1 Million
description: Spiced amber and honey create a bold, intoxicating fragrance that projects luxury and sensuality.

name: Olympéa
description: Tropical coconut and creamy vanilla evoke a sun-drenched island escape, blending aquatic freshness with warmth.

name: Invictus
description: Fresh grapefruit and woody ambroxan create a conquering, athletic fragrance perfect for confident daytime wear.

name: Pure XS
description: Crisp apple and juniper soften into creamy amber and sandalwood, creating a modern, clean-yet-warm scent.

name: La Vie Est Belle
description: Rich praline and creamy vanilla celebrate life's beautiful moments with warm, enveloping elegance.

name: Idôle
description: A modern floral tribute celebrating iconic femininity with tuberose, jasmine, and creamy sandalwood.

name: Trésor
description: Fruity florals and warm amber create a precious, romantic scent that feels like a treasured memory.

name: La Nuit Trésor
description: Nocturnal floral with sensual jasmine and warm amber, perfect for romantic evenings and special occasions.

name: Daisy
description: Innocent daisy with soft musk creates a cheerful, approachable floral perfect for youthful, everyday wear.

name: Dot
description: Playful fruity top and creamy floral heart create a youthful, approachable scent with warmth and charm.

name: Lola
description: Spiced apple and creamy caramel create a flirtatious, warm scent that feels both playful and sensual.

name: Honey
description: Golden honey and creamy tonka evoke warmth and comfort; a sweet, approachable scent for daily wear.

name: Flowerbomb
description: An explosive floral bouquet that captivates with tuberose and jasmine intensity; bold evening fragrance.

name: Bonbon
description: Gourmand caramel and tonka wrap you in sweetness; a playful, luxurious scent for evening indulgence.

name: Flowerbomb Nectar
description: Fruity floral variation of Flowerbomb with passion fruit sweetness and creamy base for sensual evenings.

name: Portrait of a Lady
description: A sophisticated rose iris with warm amber and sandalwood creates an artistic, timeless feminine portrait.

name: Carnal Flower
description: Intoxicating tuberose and creamy musk create a sensual, indolic floral that feels utterly seductive.

name: Musc Ravageur
description: Spicy iris and seductive musk blend into an addictive, sensual fragrance for confident, provocative wear.

name: Noir Épices
description: Warm spices and smoky incense create a mysterious, complex scent perfect for evening sophistication.

name: En Passant
description: Delicate iris and soft musk create a fleeting, graceful fragrance that evokes a tender moment in passing.

name: Lipstick Rose
description: A creamy, feminine rose with spicy pink pepper creates an elegant, confident fragrance with soft sexiness.

name: Geranium pour Monsieur
description: Fresh, minty geranium and herbal sage create a clean, masculine fragrance perfect for sophisticated daytime wear.

name: Eau de Magnolia
description: Creamy magnolia and soft citrus create a refined, airy fragrance ideal for fresh, feminine daytime elegance.

name: Ambre Sultan
description: Dark, resinous amber and incense create an opulent, mysterious scent that wraps you in sensual warmth.

name: Féminité du Bois
description: Delicate iris over dry cedarwood creates a feminine, sophisticated woody fragrance for refined everyday wear.

name: Borneo 1834
description: Warm spices and smoky cedarwood evoke colonial exploration with sophisticated, contemplative depth.

name: Fleurs d'Oranger
description: Delicate orange blossom and soft sandalwood create an elegant, slightly creamy floral for daytime softness.

name: Sa Majesté la Rose
description: A regal rose with soft iris and musk creates a refined, creamy floral that feels simultaneously fresh and warm.

name: Fumerie Turque
description: Smoky tobacco and rich amber evoke an exotic Turkish bazaar; complex and intoxicating for evening wear.

name: Santal Majuscule
description: Creamy sandalwood with soft iris and citrus creates a refined, masculine woody fragrance for daily sophistication.

name: Halfeti
description: Deep damask rose with soft musk and cedarwood creates a romantic, sophisticated floral with melancholic beauty.

name: Endymion
description: Aromatic neroli and carnation transition to dry cedarwood, creating a timeless masculine fragrance with quiet elegance.

name: The Tragedy of Lord George
description: Spiced amber and smoky leather evoke Gothic drama; a sophisticated, moody scent for evening sophistication.

name: Mûre et Musc
description: Juicy blackberry and soft musk create an intimate, slightly tart fragrance perfect for layering and daily wear.

name: Premier Figuier
description: Fresh fig leaf and creamy jasmine evoke Mediterranean gardens; ideal for warm days and subtle sophistication.

name: Dzing!
description: Spicy cardamom and dry hay create an unconventional, earthy fragrance evoking horse and circus atmospheres.

name: Eros
description: Bold minty sweetness over a warm amber-vanilla base. A confident evening or night-out staple that announces your arrival.

name: Bright Crystal
description: Sheer fruity florals with an icy transparency. Light enough for daily wear, elegant enough for warm-weather events.

name: Dylan Blue
description: Aquatic-aromatic backbone with violet leaf and incense depth. A versatile everyday scent with broad masculine appeal.

name: Crystal Noir
description: Spiced florals wrapped in dark amber warmth. Seductive and smooth for evening occasions and cooler months.

name: Pour Homme
description: Clean Mediterranean citrus over warm cedar and sage. An understated daily driver for office and weekend alike.

name: Pour Femme
description: Airy florals with fruity brightness and a soft woody landing. Easygoing femininity for daytime and spring.

name: Light Blue
description: Crisp Sicilian lemon and apple over light white florals. The definitive Mediterranean summer scent for any setting.

name: The One
description: Warm ginger-tobacco heart cradled in smooth amber. A refined masculine staple for dates, dinners, and evening wear.

name: K
description: Sun-warmed citrus and aromatic herbs over sturdy cedarwood. A modern king-of-the-hill daily signature.

name: Light Blue Forever
description: Deeper aquatic-ozonic take on the original, with more lasting power. Ideal for beach days and summer nights.

name: The One Eau de Parfum
description: Richer, longer-lasting amber-tobacco intensity. The cold-weather upgrade — opulent without heaviness.

name: Dolce
description: Delicate white florals with a creamy cashmere dry-down. A soft, approachable daytime floral for spring and summer.

name: Acqua di Giò
description: The original aquatic masterpiece — transparent sea notes and citrus over warm cedar. Effortless warm-weather elegance.

name: Sì
description: Blackcurrant brightness over a chypre base of patchouli and vanilla. Polished and feminine for boardroom to evening.

name: Armani Code
description: Smoky olive blossom and tonka in a sleek amber frame. A nighttime classic built for close encounters and formal events.

name: Acqua di Giò Profumo
description: The original's aquatic DNA deepened with incense and patchouli. Year-round versatility with serious projection.

name: My Way
description: Luminous tuberose and jasmine grounded by creamy cedarwood. A modern floral that bridges casual and dressed-up moments.

name: Armani Privé Rose d'Arabie
description: Opulent Taif rose entwined with smoky oud and saffron. A statement scent for special occasions and cooler evenings.

name: CK One
description: The original unisex citrus-musk — sheer, clean, and shareable. Effortless everyday freshness since 1994.

name: Eternity
description: Timeless romantic florals with a soft, powdery trail. A cornerstone feminine scent for office days and weekends.

name: Euphoria
description: Dark exotic fruits and black orchid sinking into rich mahogany-amber. Sensual and mysterious for evening occasions.

name: Obsession
description: Heady vanilla-amber intensity with animalic warmth beneath. A provocative powerhouse for cold nights and bold moods.

name: CK Everyone
description: Clean citrus-ginger simplicity with a blue tea twist. A modern, genderless everyday scent for warm weather.

name: Donna Born in Roma
description: Jasmine-drenched vanilla with a warm cashmeran cocoon. A sweet-sophisticated signature for fall, winter, and nights out.

name: Uomo Born in Roma
description: Smoky vetiver and sage with ginger brightness. A sharp, contemporary masculine for evening events and cooler seasons.

name: Voce Viva
description: Radiant gardenia and orange blossom over a mossy-vanilla base. Confident femininity for day-to-night transitions.

name: Valentino Donna
description: Iris and rose over supple leather with a patchouli base. A refined, statement-making scent for special occasions.

name: Interlude Man
description: Controlled chaos — smoky incense and oud layered over herbal spice. A monumental beast-mode scent for bold spirits.

name: Jubilation XXV
description: Regal fruit-spice opening dissolving into myrrh-oud grandeur. The pinnacle of luxurious cold-weather sophistication.

name: Reflection Man
description: Elegant jasmine-neroli uplift over creamy sandalwood. A refined masculine floral for boardrooms and black-tie events.

name: Memoir Man
description: Herbal bitterness and incense spiraling into dark vetiver-oud. A brooding, intellectual scent for contemplative moods.

name: Dia Woman
description: Lush rose-peony bouquet softened by cedar and musk. Graceful and composed for daytime elegance and professional settings.

name: Honour Woman
description: Towering white florals with smoky incense edges. A dramatic, commanding presence for evening and special occasions.

name: Aventus
description: Smoky pineapple-birch opening with an oakmoss-musk foundation. The most hyped masculine fragrance of the decade.

name: Green Irish Tweed
description: Cool green violet leaf and iris with aristocratic sandalwood depth. A timeless masculine for all seasons and occasions.

name: Silver Mountain Water
description: Crisp green tea and blackcurrant evoking alpine streams. A clean, invigorating scent for warm weather and active days.

name: Millésime Impérial
description: Sea salt and melon with an iris-musk glow. Refined coastal freshness for summer days and resort evenings.

name: Viking
description: Spiced citrus and rose over rugged sandalwood-vetiver. A powerful cold-weather signature with Viking-era boldness.

name: Aventus Cologne
description: Lighter, citrus-forward cousin of Aventus with green apple and sage. An easygoing warm-weather daily wear.

name: Royal Oud
description: Refined cedar-oud sophistication tempered by pink pepper and sandalwood. Understated luxury for formal occasions.

name: Original Santal
description: Rich sandalwood and warm spices embraced by creamy vanilla. A cozy, inviting scent for close moments and cool evenings.

name: Wind Flowers
description: An airy white floral bouquet lifted by orange blossom and grounded in sandalwood. Modern feminine grace for every day.

name: Love in White
description: Luminous magnolia and iris with a powdery rice-husk note. An elegant, pristine floral for confident daily wear.

name: Oud for Greatness
description: Saffron-lit oud over a potent musk-amber base. An unapologetic beast-mode statement for those who want to be noticed.

name: Side Effect
description: Boozy rum and cinnamon-laced tobacco sinking into creamy vanilla. An addictive gourmand for cold nights and close company.

name: Musk Therapy
description: Pure skin-musk warmth with lavender calm and sandalwood glow. A comforting, second-skin scent for quiet intimacy.

name: Absolute Aphrodisiac
description: Dark saffron-myrrh opening melting into animalic rose and vanilla. Designed to mesmerize at close range after dark.

name: Psychedelic Love
description: Hypnotic rose-hedione radiance amplified by vanilla warmth. A magnetic, molecule-driven scent that draws people in.

name: Layton
description: Apple-lavender freshness fading into spiced vanilla warmth. The breakout niche hit — crowd-pleasing and long-lasting.

name: Delina
description: Juicy lychee-rose over a warm cashmeran base. A romantic, head-turning floral for dates and dressed-up occasions.

name: Pegasus
description: Creamy almond-heliotrope sweetness anchored by sandalwood-vanilla. A smooth, crowd-pleasing cold-weather signature.

name: Herod
description: Rich cinnamon-tobacco warmth fading into smoky vetiver-vanilla. A cozy, masculine beast for cold nights and fireside.

name: Sedley
description: Minty-citrus freshness with a green herbal heart. A crisp, easy-wearing warm-weather scent for casual days.

name: Layton Exclusif
description: Layton's darker, oud-laced cousin with amplified vanilla-amber depth. A nuclear-projection winter signature.

name: Colonia
description: Bright Italian citrus and lavender over a clean woody base. Timeless Mediterranean elegance for warm days and layering.

name: Fico di Amalfi
description: Sun-ripened fig and citrus evoking the Amalfi coast. A joyful, natural green scent for summer days and garden parties.

name: Blu Mediterraneo Arancia di Capri
description: Pure Italian orange and mandarin with a subtle caramel warmth. A sparkling, mood-lifting citrus for sunny days.

name: Blu Mediterraneo Mandorlo di Sicilia
description: Toasted Sicilian almond and vanilla with a hint of coffee. A cheerful gourmand for brunch, travel, and easy weekends.

name: Rosa Nobile
description: Noble centifolia rose with peppery brightness and a clean musk trail. An elegant daily floral for polished settings.

name: Baccarat Rouge 540
description: Luminous saffron-amber with crystalline sweetness and a resinous glow. The defining scent of a generation — unmistakable in a crowd.

name: Baccarat Rouge 540 Extrait de Parfum
description: Deeper, more resinous intensity with bitter almond and balsamic warmth. The nuclear-projection cold-weather upgrade.

name: Grand Soir
description: Liquid amber and benzoin warmth with a cinnamon-saffron spark. A velvety evening companion for black-tie and winter nights.

name: Gentle Fluidity Silver
description: Clean juniper-musk transparency over soft woods. A versatile, genderless everyday scent with effortless elegance.

name: Gentle Fluidity Gold
description: The warmer, sweeter sibling — vanilla-balsam richness with the same juniper-musk core. Inviting and skin-close.

name: Petit Matin
description: Dewy lemon-litchi freshness with a clean musky landing. Like the first hour of a perfect summer morning.

name: Amyris Homme
description: Herbal rosemary brightness dissolving into creamy iris-wood warmth. A refined, no-effort daily wear for any setting.

name: À la rose
description: A multifaceted rose study — fresh, dewy, and luminous without powderiness. The modern benchmark for wearable rose.

name: Angel
description: The original gourmand — patchouli-chocolate decadence with cotton candy sweetness. A love-it-or-hate-it icon since 1992.

name: Alien
description: Radiant jasmine powered by cashmeran-amber warmth. An otherworldly feminine presence that commands attention.

name: Angel Nova
description: Angel reimagined with fruity raspberry brightness and rose. A more approachable, daytime-friendly take on the icon.

name: Alien Goddess
description: Coconut-jasmine luminosity grounded by vanilla cashmere. A softer, more sensual evolution of the Alien DNA.

name: Aura
description: Wild rhubarb-green opening with animalic depth and vanilla warmth. An unconventional, nature-inspired statement scent.

name: Le Male
description: The iconic lavender-vanilla powerhouse. Sweet, spicy, unmistakably masculine — a pillar of 90s fragrance culture.

name: Le Male Le Parfum
description: Darker, more intense Le Male with iris depth and amplified vanilla-amber. Built for cold-weather seduction.

name: Scandal
description: Honeyed gardenia with a caramel-patchouli base. Sweet, provocative femininity designed for nights that make headlines.

name: Classique
description: Warm orange blossom and vanilla-powdered florals. A sensual, comforting classic that defined accessible femininity.

name: Scandal Pour Homme
description: Sweet caramel and leather over smoky vetiver. A bold, modern masculine that bridges gourmand and aromatic worlds.

name: For Her
description: The musk masterclass — a warm, skin-hugging blend of rose, amber, and patchouli. Effortlessly sensual for every occasion.

name: For Her Eau de Toilette
description: Lighter, more transparent take on the original musk formula. Orange blossom freshness for easy daytime elegance.

name: For Him
description: Clean musk and violet leaf over vetiver-patchouli depth. A subtle, modern masculine for the quietly confident.

name: Pure Musc
description: Stripped-back musk distilled to its purest form with cashmeran warmth. Minimalist sensuality worn close to the skin.

name: L'Interdit
description: Luminous white florals clashed against dark vetiver-patchouli. A beautiful tension between innocence and rebellion.

name: Gentleman Eau de Parfum
description: Sharp iris-cardamom over a patchouli-leather base. Refined, composed masculinity for evening and colder months.

name: Irresistible
description: Sparkling pear and rose with a warm musky glow. Joyful, charming femininity for brunch through evening drinks.

name: Ange ou Démon
description: Mysterious lily-orchid heart with saffron warmth and oud depth. A dramatic, shape-shifting scent for evening occasions.

name: Amarige
description: Bold gardenia-mimosa radiance with rich amber warmth. A powerhouse floral from the golden era of fragrance.

name: Good Girl
description: Coffee-cocoa richness meets tuberose florals in a stiletto-shaped bottle. Bold, glamorous femininity for the night.
Fresh camellia-gardenia with clean musk and incense. A breezy, modern urban scent for everyday city life.

name: 212 VIP
description: Passion fruit and rum party vibes grounded by gardenia and vanilla warmth. A night-out scent with VIP energy.

name: Bad Boy
description: Peppery cocoa and sage backed by warm tonka-leather. Confident and edgy for cold-weather nights and social scenes.

name: Very Good Girl
description: Fruity lychee-rose sweetness over a warm vanilla-vetiver base. A playful, seductive evolution of the Good Girl line.

name: L'Eau d'Issey
description: Pioneering aquatic florals — water lily, peony, and a crystalline finish. The scent that launched a thousand aquatics.

name: L'Eau d'Issey Pour Homme
description: Clean yuzu-citrus over aromatic sage and vetiver. The original aquatic masculine — effortless summer freshness.

name: Nuit d'Issey
description: Dark leather and incense — the nocturnal counterpoint to the daytime aquatic. Moody sophistication for evening wear.

name: A Drop d'Issey
description: Delicate lilac and almond milk with airy florals. A gentle, comforting everyday scent like morning light on linen.

name: Explorer
description: Bergamot-patchouli-vetiver in the Aventus family at a fraction of the price. A versatile daily masculine that punches up.

name: Legend
description: Clean lavender-geranium over warm sandalwood. A dependable, office-safe masculine for those who value consistency.

name: Legend Spirit
description: Fresh aquatic-citrus with lavender and cashmere wood. A light, sporty alternative for warm weather and active days.

name: Explorer Ultra Blue
description: Bright citrus and tropical starfruit over cypress-leather depth. A fresh, summer-ready evolution of the Explorer line.
